_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
focal_document_element_description: Apply cryptography primitives to protect the confidentiality and integrity of sensitive data.
reference_document_element_description: Knowledge of data subject rights under applicable data protection regulations, including rights of access, rectification, erasure, restriction of processing, data portability, objection, and rights related to automated decision-making and profiling.
comments: DCWF task intersects with WIDAI RC domain. RC-K-006 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: SP-A-002 (SP, cosine: 0.496), SP-K-010 (SP, cosine: 0.492).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark.
primary_method.significance: STS 2.7/10 (raw 0.267). Shared vocabulary: [data]. DCWF-only terms [apply, confidentiality, cryptography, integrity, primitives, protect] vs WIDAI-only terms [access, applicable, automated, decision, erasure, knowledge] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.856 (P=0.875, R=0.837). P exceeds R by 0.037 — the DCWF element's 12 words are well-captured by the WIDAI KSA's 30 words, but the KSA contains additional specificity not reflected in the DCWF element.

nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: entailment-dominant (63.6%). The model interprets "Apply cryptography primitives to protect the confidentiality and integrity of se" as logically implying aspects of "Knowledge of data subject rights under applicable data protection regulations, i" — directional semantic containment consistent with 'Intersects with' classification.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.502 > STS 0.267 (gap +0.235). Independent encoding finds more similarity than cross-attention. Shared surface terms [data] inflate the bi-encoder, but cross-attention detects semantic divergence beneath the vocabulary overlap.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens).
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 12.5%. Shared tokens: [data]. DCWF-only: [apply, confidentiality, cryptography, integrity, primitives, protect]. WIDAI-only: [access, applicable, automated, decision, erasure, knowledge].

signals.detail: Bi-encoder/STS gap 0.235 with low STS 0.267. Candidate selection was likely driven by shared vocabulary rather than functional alignment. The functionally correct KSA may not have been in the top-5 candidates.
